name: Generate and Analyze Age Groups
description: Create a CSV of 50 random people with ages, group by decade, and save analysis

tasks.name: Generate Random Names CSV
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to execute Python code that: 1) Generates exactly 50 random names with random ages between 18-65 inclusive, 2) Saves as 'people.csv' with headers 'name,age'. Use a list of common names like ['Alice','Bob','Charlie','Diana','Eve','Frank','Grace','Henry','Ivy','Jack','Kate','Liam','Mia','Noah','Olivia','Paul','Quinn','Rose','Sam','Tina'] and random.randint(18,65) for ages. Output the FULL absolute path where the CSV was saved and confirm it contains exactly 50 rows.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the complete file path to people.csv and confirms 50 entries were created

tasks.name: Analyze Age Groups by Decade
tasks.description:
You MUST call python_exec to execute Python code that: 1) Reads 'people.csv' from the path in task_001's output, 2) Groups ages into decades (Teens:18-19, Twenties:20-29, Thirties:30-39, Forties:40-49, Fifties:50-59, Sixties:60-65), 3) Counts how many people fall into each decade group. Output the COMPLETE analysis results verbatim with each decade label and its exact count. Do NOT summarize as 'analysis complete' — downstream task needs the actual text. Output format example: 'Teens (18-19): 3 people
Twenties (20-29): 12 people
Thirties (30-39): 8 people
...'
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the full text analysis showing all 6 age decade groups (Teens through Sixties) with their counts referenced from task_001's CSV

tasks.name: Save Analysis to age_groups.txt
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the age group analysis text from task_002's output into a file named 'age_groups.txt'. Extract the complete decade count text from task_002 (the lines showing 'Teens...', 'Twenties...', etc. with counts) and write it verbatim to the file. Do NOT modify, truncate, or summarize the analysis text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms age_groups.txt was successfully created and contains the complete decade analysis text from task_002
